name: Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 x Med Oranges, peeled and sectioned
1 tablespoon Olive oil or cooking oil
recipeInstructions:
For salad, in a large salad bowl place spinach, orange sections, onion slices, and water chestnuts (use 1/2 of the contents from an 8 oz can). Sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon pepper.
For dressing, in a screw-top jar combine orange juice, oil, honey, sesame seeds, and mustard. Cover and shake well. Pour dressing over salad. Toss lightly to coat. Serve immediately.
